feed.title: Google Cloud: Secure Web Proxy
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Secure Web Proxy

entry.content:
When deploying your Secure Web Proxy instance as next hop, you can now configure the gateway to listen on all ports (from 1 to 65535). By using this feature, your proxy can automatically intercept and enforce security policies and rules to all outbound traffic, removing the need to manage specific port lists.

This feature is supported in Preview.
entry.summary: Secure Web Proxy now supports listening on all ports (1-65535) when deployed as a next hop. This allows for automatic interception and policy enforcement on all outbound traffic without managing specific port lists. This feature is currently in Preview.
entry.title: Feature: Secure Web Proxy listens on all ports

entry.summary: VPC Service Controls is now generally available. This feature enhances security by allowing you to define a security perimeter around your Google Cloud resources.
entry.title: Feature: VPC Service Controls Now Generally Available
